items.title: Wednesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.description: The Dow closed at a record high on Tuesday, but the Nasdaq ended the lower as investors shifted away from technology stocks.

items.title: Jim Cramer Prefers D-Wave Over BTQ as a Quantum Computing Pick
items.description: BTQ Technologies Corp. (NASDAQ:BTQ) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer offered insights on. During the lightning round, a caller asked about the company, and Cramer commented: “Okay, look, I think that that’s going to be yours, that’s a speculation for you, if you’re going to speculate in quantum. For me, it’s going to be […]

items.title: Dow rallies 300 points to new record with shutdown set to end Wednesday: Live updates
items.description: Tuesday saw a tale of two markets emerge — the 30-stock Dow rallied more than 550 points to close at a record high, while the Nasdaq Composite slipped.

items.title: IBM, IBD Stock Of The Day, Near Buy Point Amid AI Software, Quantum Computing Push
items.description: IBM stock has gained 43% in 2025 and is near a new buy point. Wall Street is focused on its software business, AI outlook and goal to be a leader in quantum computing.

items.title: 'That World Has Changed': Alex Gorsky on Shift to Regionalization
items.description: Alex Gorsky, board director for Apple, IBM, and JPMorgan Chase, discusses the end of the 30-year globalization era as businesses begin to take a more regionalized approach.
